create.title: New Simulation
create.greeting: Describe your marketing plan, or start from a template.

beauty.title: Perfect Diary · Lipstick
beauty.sellingPoints: Long-lasting, matte velvet texture, wide shade range, #1 domestic makeup brand
beauty.description: Bestseller with 120K+ notes on Xiaohongshu, 100K+ monthly sales on Tmall. Real case: 50x sales growth in 8 months. Used for benchmark validation.
beauty.creative1: Mid-tier beauty KOLs (10K-100K followers) swatch videos + daily makeup tutorials, highlighting longevity and pigmentation, natural seeding style
beauty.creative2: Shade comparison collages + usage scenarios, limited-time discounts, CTA to Tmall flagship store
beauty.creative3: Target keywords: affordable lip glaze, non-fading lipstick, student-friendly makeup

ecommerce.title: PROYA · Bubble Mask
ecommerce.sellingPoints: Bubbles up on face for deep pore cleansing, fun to use, affordable and effective
ecommerce.description: Viral hit: ¥60M sales in 1 month, #BubbleDance hashtag reached 870M views. Real case for benchmark validation.
ecommerce.creative1: 15s bubble-forming process + before/after pore comparison, paired with #BubbleDance challenge
ecommerce.creative2: KOL blind test: bubble mask vs regular mask, highlighting cleaning effect and fun factor
ecommerce.creative3: User-generated content showing bubble mask usage, authentic seeding note style

app.title: App Download Campaign
app.sellingPoints: AI personalized workout plans, real-time form correction via camera, free basic plan
app.description: Fitness app targeting gym beginners who need guided workouts
app.creative1: Split screen: struggling with random exercises vs following AI-guided plan. CTA: Download free
app.creative2: Fitness KOLs document 7-day challenge, showing AI form correction in action
app.creative3: Carousel: app screenshots - AI plan generation, workout dashboard, user stories

create.chatPlaceholder: Describe your plan or say what to change...
create.inputPlaceholder:
Describe your marketing plan in natural language...

Example: We are PROYA, launching a new anti-aging serum priced at ¥299. Key selling points are natural ingredients and clinically proven efficacy. Plan to spend ¥500K/month on Xiaohongshu: ¥200K on KOL seeding (10 beauty KOLs, video content), ¥200K on in-feed ads, ¥100K on search ads. Target audience: women aged 25-35.
create.confirmDescription: AI has extracted the following from your description. Review and edit before starting simulation.
create.missingFields: The following information could not be determined and may need your input:

placement.title: Ad Placements
placement.duplicateWarning: This platform + placement type combination already exists

product.title: Product
product.brandNamePlaceholder: e.g. Nike, PMPM, or your brand name
product.name: Product Name
product.sellingPointsPlaceholder: e.g. Patented technology, 10x faster, used by 1M+ users

creative.title: Ad Creative
creative.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe your ad creative: format, key message, visual style...

audience.title: Target Audience
audience.regionPlaceholder: e.g. Tier 1-2 cities, Nationwide, North America

settings.title: Simulation Settings
settings.agentCountHint: More agents = more accurate but slower & costlier

metrics.attentionRateTip: Percentage of exposed users who noticed the ad
metrics.ctrTip: Click-Through Rate: percentage of users who clicked after noticing the ad
metrics.cvrTip: Conversion Rate: percentage of clickers who completed a purchase/conversion
metrics.overallConversionRateTip: End-to-end conversion from exposure to purchase = Attention × CTR × CVR
metrics.estimatedCPATip: Cost Per Action: average cost to acquire one conversion, based on budget and estimated reach
metrics.simulatedDisclaimer: Simulated conversion rates are for relative comparison only, not actual performance predictions

settings.llmDescription: Configure your LLM provider. Credentials are stored locally in your browser and passed to the server per request. The server does not log or persist any credentials.
settings.concurrencyHint: Number of concurrent LLM requests. Use 1-3 for free tiers.

interview.emptyHint: Ask this agent anything about their decision.
interview.emptyExample: e.g. "Why didn't you click?" or "What would make you buy?"
